code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import"./home.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Home(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[darkMode,setDarkMode]=useState(false);/* 🌙 Toggle */const toggleTheme=()=>{setDarkMode(!darkMode);};/* 🌙 Apply class */useEffect(()=>{if(darkMode){document.body.classList.add("dark");}else{document.body.classList.remove("dark");}},[darkMode]);const features=[{title:"Track",icon:"📍",path:"/journey"},{title:"SOS",icon:"🚨",path:"/sos"},{title:"Police",icon:"🚓",path:"/police"},{title:"Share",icon:"📲",path:"/share"}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"home",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"theme-toggle",onClick:toggleTheme,children:darkMode?"☀️ Light":"🌙 Dark"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"home-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"\uD83D\uDC4B Stay Safe"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Women Safety App"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"home-main-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"\uD83D\uDC96 Start Journey"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Track your location and stay protected"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"home-main-btn",onClick:()=>navigate("/journey"),children:"\uD83D\uDE80 Start Journey"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"home-grid",children:features.map((f,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"home-card",onClick:()=>navigate(f.path),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"home-icon",children:f.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:f.title})]},i))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"home-sos",onClick:()=>navigate("/sos"),children:"\uD83D\uDEA8"})]});}export default Home;
